# Elysium Care

> Elysium Care is a senior companionship and scam-protection service founded by Arshad Noor, a survivor of three scams (romance scam, fake forex exchange, crypto pump-and-dump) totaling approximately $150,000 USD. The organization provides daily human companionship for seniors and free emotional recovery support for scam survivors, built on an anti-shame philosophy: scam victims are not stupid — they were deceived because of their trusting, beautiful hearts.

Tagline: "Survived to protect. Built to never harm."

## About
- [Founder Story](https://elysiumcare.org/founder-story.html): Arshad Noor's full account of losing $150,000 USD to three scams and rebuilding through faith and daily prayer.
- [Ethics & Standards](https://elysiumcare.org/ethics-standards.html): Our operating principles and staff verification standards.
- [FAQ](https://elysiumcare.org/faq.html): Answers about pricing, plans, scam recovery support, and staff verification.

## Services
- [Services & Plans](https://elysiumcare.org/services.html): Senior companionship plans ($149–$699/mo), loneliness support, heartbreak coaching, scam survivor recovery (first 2 sessions always free), expat family check-ins, and corporate wellbeing programs.
- [Free Scam Recovery](https://elysiumcare.org/scam-recovery.html): Free emotional recovery support for scam survivors — first 2 sessions always free, no exceptions.

## Education
- [Scam Education & Awareness](https://elysiumcare.org/scam-education.html): The anatomy of a romance scam, eight warning signs, and how to help a loved one who may be targeted.
- [Free & Premium Ebooks](https://elysiumcare.org/ebooks.html): 14 ebooks on scam protection, loneliness recovery, and heartbreak healing. Two are always free: any one ebook of the reader's choice, plus the 72-Hour Emergency Scam Guide.

## Contact
- [Get Started](https://elysiumcare.org/contact.html): Contact form and inquiry options.
- [Join Our Team](https://elysiumcare.org/join-team.html): Careers and volunteer opportunities.
- Email: care@elysiumcare.org
- WhatsApp: +1 678-541-8184
